욥기 26:2.content: “How have you helped him who is without power! How have you saved the arm that has no strength!

욥기 26:3.content: How have you counseled him who has no wisdom, and plentifully declared sound knowledge!

욥기 26:4.content: To whom have you uttered words? Whose spirit came out of you?

욥기 26:5.content: “The departed spirits tremble, those beneath the waters and all that live in them.

욥기 26:6.content: Sheol is naked before God, and Abaddon has no covering.

욥기 26:7.content: He stretches out the north over empty space, and hangs the earth on nothing.

욥기 26:8.content: He binds up the waters in his thick clouds, and the cloud is not burst under them.

욥기 26:9.content: He encloses the face of his throne, and spreads his cloud on it.

욥기 26:10.content: He has described a boundary on the surface of the waters, and to the confines of light and darkness.

욥기 26:11.content: The pillars of heaven tremble and are astonished at his rebuke.

욥기 26:12.content: He stirs up the sea with his power, and by his understanding he strikes through Rahab.

욥기 26:13.content: By his Spirit the heavens are garnished. His hand has pierced the swift serpent.

욥기 26:14.content: Behold, these are but the outskirts of his ways. How small a whisper do we hear of him! But the thunder of his power who can understand?”
